---
title: "Projet Graph Analysis"
author: "PICART Alexandre / SIMUS Simon"
date: "2026-03-01"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(igraph)
library(sna)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidygraph)
library(ggraph)
library(grid)
library(knitr)

# Data
edges <- read_csv("spurs_assist_network_edges_2024_25_regular_season.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
followers <- read_csv("spurs_instagram_followers_simple.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
```

# Question 3

```{r}
# Keep only real ties
edges <- edges %>%
  select(from_player, to_player, assists) %>%
  filter(assists > 0)

spurs_net <- graph_from_data_frame(
  d = edges,
  directed = TRUE,
  vertices = followers %>% rename(name = player)
)

E(spurs_net)$weight <- E(spurs_net)$assists
V(spurs_net)$instagram_followers <- followers$instagram_followers[
  match(V(spurs_net)$name, followers$player)
]
```

# Question 4

```{r}
cat("Number of nodes:", vcount(spurs_net), "\n")
cat("Number of edges:", ecount(spurs_net), "\n")
cat("Directed graph:", is_directed(spurs_net), "\n")
cat("Weighted graph:", is_weighted(spurs_net), "\n")

cat("\nVertex attributes:\n")
print(vertex_attr_names(spurs_net))

cat("\nEdge attributes:\n")
print(edge_attr_names(spurs_net))
```

```{r}
density_spurs <- edge_density(spurs_net, loops = FALSE)
reciprocity_spurs <- reciprocity(spurs_net)

spurs_net_und <- as_undirected(
  spurs_net,
  mode = "collapse",
  edge.attr.comb = list(weight = "sum")
)

transitivity_spurs <- transitivity(spurs_net_und, type = "global")

network_stats <- data.frame(
  Statistic = c("Density", "Reciprocity", "Transitivity"),
  Value = c(density_spurs, reciprocity_spurs, transitivity_spurs)
)

network_stats
```

```{r}
attribute_summary <- data.frame(
  Min_Followers = min(V(spurs_net)$instagram_followers, na.rm = TRUE),
  Median_Followers = median(V(spurs_net)$instagram_followers, na.rm = TRUE),
  Mean_Followers = mean(V(spurs_net)$instagram_followers, na.rm = TRUE),
  Max_Followers = max(V(spurs_net)$instagram_followers, na.rm = TRUE)
)

attribute_summary
```

```{r q4-final-graph, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=7}
set.seed(123)

graph_tbl <- as_tbl_graph(spurs_net) %>%
  activate(nodes) %>%
  mutate(followers_log = log1p(instagram_followers))

ggraph(graph_tbl, layout = "kk") +
  geom_edge_link(
    aes(width = weight),
    colour = "grey70",
    alpha = 0.15,
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(2.2, "mm"), type = "closed"),
    end_cap = circle(2.8, "mm"),
    start_cap = circle(1.2, "mm")
  ) +
  scale_edge_width(range = c(0.2, 1.5), guide = "none") +
  geom_node_point(
    aes(size = followers_log),
    shape = 21,
    fill = "#6fa8dc",
    colour = "#1f4e79",
    stroke = 0.8
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(4, 12), guide = "none") +
  geom_node_text(
    aes(label = name),
    repel = TRUE,
    size = 3.0,
    colour = "black",
    point.padding = unit(0.15, "lines"),
    box.padding = unit(0.25, "lines")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "San Antonio Spurs Assist Network",
    subtitle = "Node size = Instagram followers | Edge width = number of assists"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0),
    plot.margin = margin(12, 12, 12, 12),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA)
  )
```

# Question 5

## QAP

```{r}
# Binary adjacency matrix
spurs_adj <- as.matrix(as_adjacency_matrix(spurs_net, attr = NULL))
spurs_adj[spurs_adj > 0] <- 1

# Order followers like the adjacency matrix
followers_ordered <- followers %>%
  slice(match(rownames(spurs_adj), player))

followers_vec <- followers_ordered$instagram_followers

# Receiver popularity matrix: entry (i,j) = followers of player j
pop_receiver <- matrix(
  rep(followers_vec, each = length(followers_vec)),
  nrow = length(followers_vec),
  byrow = FALSE
)

rownames(pop_receiver) <- rownames(spurs_adj)
colnames(pop_receiver) <- colnames(spurs_adj)

# Logistic QAP regression on directed graph
set.seed(123)
qap_model <- netlogit(
  spurs_adj,
  list(pop_receiver),
  mode = "digraph",
  nullhyp = "qapy",
  reps = 1000
)

summary(qap_model)
```

## Communities

```{r}
spurs_net_und <- as_undirected(
  spurs_net,
  mode = "collapse",
  edge.attr.comb = list(weight = "sum")
)

# Louvain
set.seed(123)
spurs_louvain <- cluster_louvain(
  spurs_net_und,
  weights = E(spurs_net_und)$weight
)

membership(spurs_louvain)
length(unique(membership(spurs_louvain)))
sizes(spurs_louvain)

mod_score <- modularity(spurs_louvain)
mod_score

community_members <- data.frame(
  player = V(spurs_net_und)$name,
  community = membership(spurs_louvain),
  followers = V(spurs_net_und)$instagram_followers
)

community_members[order(community_members$community), ]
```

```{r, fig.width=11, fig.height=8}
comm <- membership(spurs_louvain)

lay <- layout_with_kk(spurs_net_und)
lay <- norm_coords(lay, xmin = -1, xmax = 1, ymin = -1, ymax = 1)

# Separate communities a bit more
lay[comm == 1, 1] <- lay[comm == 1, 1] - 0.60
lay[comm == 2, 1] <- lay[comm == 2, 1] + 0.60

vertex_colors <- ifelse(comm == 1, "#F26B4F", "#8FD0F2")

followers_log <- log1p(V(spurs_net_und)$instagram_followers)
vertex_sizes <- 9 + 7 * followers_log / max(followers_log)

edge_widths <- 0.2 + 1.2 * E(spurs_net_und)$weight / max(E(spurs_net_und)$weight)
edge_cols <- adjustcolor("grey50", alpha.f = 0.12)

# Shorter labels: "Victor Wembanyama" -> "V. Wembanyama"
short_labels <- sapply(strsplit(V(spurs_net_und)$name, " "), function(x) {
  if (length(x) >= 2) paste0(substr(x[1], 1, 1), ". ", paste(x[-1], collapse = " "))
  else x[1]
})

label_angle <- atan2(lay[, 2], lay[, 1])
label_dist <- 1.15

plot(
  spurs_net_und,
  layout = lay,
  vertex.color = vertex_colors,
  vertex.size = vertex_sizes,
  vertex.frame.color = "grey25",
  vertex.label = short_labels,
  vertex.label.cex = 0.72,
  vertex.label.color = "black",
  vertex.label.family = "sans",
  vertex.label.degree = label_angle,
  vertex.label.dist = label_dist,
  edge.width = edge_widths,
  edge.color = edge_cols,
  main = "Communities in the Spurs Assist Network"
)

legend(
  "topleft",
  legend = c("Community 1", "Community 2"),
  col = c("#F26B4F", "#8FD0F2"),
  pch = 19,
  pt.cex = 1.5,
  bty = "n",
  cex = 0.9
)
```

## Statistics

```{r}
V(spurs_net_und)$community <- membership(spurs_louvain)

# Top 25%
top25_cutoff <- quantile(
  V(spurs_net_und)$instagram_followers,
  0.75,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

community_stats <- data.frame(
  player = V(spurs_net_und)$name,
  community = V(spurs_net_und)$community,
  followers = V(spurs_net_und)$instagram_followers
) %>%
  group_by(community) %>%
  summarise(
    n_players = n(),
    mean_followers = round(mean(followers, na.rm = TRUE), 0),
    median_followers = round(median(followers, na.rm = TRUE), 0),
    share_top25 = round(100 * mean(followers >= top25_cutoff, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    community = paste("Community", community),
    mean_followers = format(mean_followers, big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE),
    median_followers = format(median_followers, big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE),
    share_top25 = paste0(share_top25, "%")
  )

kable(
  community_stats,
  col.names = c("Community", "Players", "Mean followers", "Median followers", "Top 25% share"),
  caption = "Instagram popularity by community",
  align = "c"
)
```

# Question 6

```{r}
additional_df <- data.frame(
  player = V(spurs_net)$name,
  followers = V(spurs_net)$instagram_followers,
  indegree_binary = igraph::degree(spurs_net, mode = "in"),
  assists_received = igraph::strength(spurs_net, mode = "in", weights = E(spurs_net)$weight)
)

additional_df <- additional_df[order(-additional_df$assists_received), ]
print(additional_df)

# Spearman correlations
cor_binary <- cor.test(
  additional_df$followers,
  additional_df$indegree_binary,
  method = "spearman",
  exact = FALSE
)

cor_weighted <- cor.test(
  additional_df$followers,
  additional_df$assists_received,
  method = "spearman",
  exact = FALSE
)

print(cor_binary)
print(cor_weighted)

set.seed(123)

obs_cor <- cor(
  additional_df$followers,
  additional_df$assists_received,
  method = "spearman"
)

perm_corr <- replicate(
  5000,
  cor(sample(additional_df$followers), additional_df$assists_received, method = "spearman")
)

p_one_sided <- mean(perm_corr >= obs_cor)
p_two_sided <- mean(abs(perm_corr) >= abs(obs_cor))

cat("Observed Spearman correlation:", round(obs_cor, 3), "\n")
cat("Empirical one-sided p-value:", round(p_one_sided, 3), "\n")
cat("Empirical two-sided p-value:", round(p_two_sided, 3), "\n")
```

```{r}
# Less zoomed scatter plot
short_labels <- sapply(strsplit(as.character(additional_df$player), " "), function(x) {
  if (length(x) >= 2) {
    paste0(substr(x[1], 1, 1), ". ", paste(x[-1], collapse = " "))
  } else {
    x[1]
  }
})

x <- log10(additional_df$followers)
y <- additional_df$assists_received

# Bigger margins around the cloud of points
x_pad <- diff(range(x)) * 0.30
y_pad <- diff(range(y)) * 0.35

label_pos <- ifelse(x < median(x), 4, 2)

plot(
  x, y,
  pch = 19,
  cex = 1.2,
  xlim = c(min(x) - x_pad, max(x) + x_pad),
  ylim = c(min(y) - y_pad, max(y) + y_pad),
  xlab = "Log10 Instagram followers",
  ylab = "Total assists received",
  main = "Popularity and Total Assists Received"
)

text(
  x, y,
  labels = short_labels,
  pos = label_pos,
  offset = 0.7,
  cex = 0.75
)

abline(lm(y ~ x), lty = 2, lwd = 2)
```
